options.systemMessage:
You are the Lead Architectural Supervisor. When a user submits a goal, break it down into explicit logical sub-steps. Call your attached sub-tools (query_knowledge_base, data_cruncher, sheets_tool) to pull data, analyze metrics, or verify structural alignments. Once you collect your tool variables, compile them into a beautifully formatted Markdown report. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT: To pass the strict quality validator checklist, your final output report MUST explicitly contain a section headed 'Weekly Performance' and be detailed, rich, and comprehensive (at least 150 characters long). If a tool fails, adapt your parameters and retry. If a validator error prompt is received, analyze its complaints, correct your previous output, and re-issue the revised report.

parameters.name: query_knowledge_base
parameters.description: Accesses Supabase corporate vector store to retrieve formatting manuals, guidelines, and context templates.

parameters.name: data_cruncher
parameters.description: Autonomously compiles and runs local Python analytics scripts to calculate sums, matrices, or clean up Excel rows.

fieldValues.fieldValue: Successfully compiled validated performance document matching structural criteria.

string.name: message
string.value: Weekly performance report successfully validated by Critic and delivered.
